## Summary

Describe what is being promoted from `development` to `main`.

## Promotion Checklist

- [ ] `development` has the intended changes for production
- [ ] Preview/staging was checked on the Cloudflare Pages deployment
- [ ] No unrelated changes are included in this promotion
- [ ] The release notes or deployment notes are up to date, if needed
- [ ] The PR title and description are accurate

Add any deployment-specific context, risks, or follow-up work here.
